title: Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis
use_when: Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis. Use when the user needs a product workflow for business analysis related to post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis. Trigger terms: pm, business-analysis, iteration, roadmap, feedback.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis when the request is mainly a different lifecycle artifact; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis launch learning report with release evidence, feedback, decision, and next iteration
framework_fit: Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis fits Discovery work in the Launch & Learn lifecycle when the user needs Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis launch learning report with release evidence, feedback, decision, and next iteration and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis launch learning report with release evidence, feedback, decision, and next iteration without tying recommendations to the user's Launch & Learn stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis as generic Discovery advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $post-launch-feedback-into-v2-improvements-synthesis to turn this post context into a decision-ready Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis launch learning report with release evidence, feedback, decision, and next iteration.
examples.expected_artifact: Post-launch feedback into v2 improvements synthesis launch learning report with release evidence, feedback, decision, and next iteration
